patch:
--- a/priority_encoder.v
+++ b/priority_encoder.v
@@ -1,16 +1,16 @@
 module priority_encoder (
   input [63:0] request,
   input [7:0] mask,
   output reg [7:0] priority_out
 );
 
-  always @(request) begin
+  always @(request or mask) begin
     priority_out = 8'b0;
     for (int i = 0; i < 64; i = i + 1) begin
       if (request[i] && !mask[i % 8]) begin
         priority_out = i[7:0];
         break;
       end
     end
   end
 
 endmodule
